name: Millbrook Spur
region: A freight-built depot yard where the King's Road bends east toward Andorhal

sensoryProfile.sight: An empty freight yard, dead chimney, unbroken ice on the water barrel, blank ledgers on the shelf, and a rear office holding a body cleaners hoped would pass at a glance.
sensoryProfile.sound: Cold flat silence over a place that should have been full of teams, shouted weights, and wheel noise.
sensoryProfile.smell: Ink, dust, cold wood, and the dead stillness of a room staged to look recently proper.
sensoryProfile.touch: Fresh paper in sham ledgers, chalk dust on a wagon slate, and swept boards around a body laid too neatly.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: Counter-investigation made visible. The enemy has not just used the road; it has curated what pursuers are allowed to see.

establishedFacts.fact: Millbrook Spur was built for freight rather than comfort and offers nearly a mile of visibility down the southern approach.
The front office is a false face: blank books, display invoices, and missing real records.
A dead overseer hidden in the back room proves the cleaners silence logistics personnel as well as village watchers.
A chalk slate and torn route scrap recovered here put the Barov name directly inside the same road web as the wheel-inside-wheel factor mark.

eventsHere.event: The party discovers a cleaned depot, a silenced overseer, and the first surviving Barov-linked route fragment.
